message:
fix: harden auth write, extension output capture, and session recovery

Three independent improvements to core reliability:

auth.rs: replace bare `as usize` cast with try_from for crash-safe
file padding length calculation; add sync_data() after flush to
ensure durability on fsync-delayed filesystems

extension_dispatcher.rs: refactor stdout/stderr capture from
head-truncating Vec to tail-keeping VecDeque ring buffer — when
a subprocess exceeds the output size limit, the most recent output
is now preserved instead of the earliest, which is far more useful
for debugging long-running tool invocations

session_store_v2.rs: remove strict EOF gate on corrupted frame
handling during index rebuild — previously, corruption that
occurred mid-segment (not at EOF) would hard-error and prevent
session recovery; now all corrupted frames are logged with full
context (at_eof + missing_newline) and gracefully truncated

http/client.rs: rustfmt line wrapping for sleep_fut chain
agent.rs: add ubs:ignore annotation for false-positive secret flag
rpc.rs: reorder imports per rustfmt convention

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
